frenchify.name: Frenchify with Vyom
story: Vyom had a small YouTube channel teaching French. Good content, but zero system for growth.
TGE built a research-driven content engine: scripted reels based on trending search terms, strategic posting.
Result: 616K views on a single reel, 20x follower growth, and a follower-to-student pipeline.
frenchify.before: 10K followers, sporadic posting, no conversion system

drsw.name: Dr. SW Clinics
story: Dr. Sherif Wakil is one of Europe's leading cosmetic practitioners. Strong reputation, limited digital growth.
TGE's approach: 'Less Is More.' Premium content matching brand positioning. Quality over quantity.
Result: 20M+ impressions, verified, packed booking calendar. As seen in Daily Mail, Sky, The Sun.

hoogah.name: Hoogah
story: Hoogah helps event organizers run events where networking actually works. Great product, expensive leads.
TGE rebuilt the funnel: new brand website, dedicated landing pages, paid campaigns across the US and Canada, and a 100+ piece content engine.
Result: switching from instant forms to the landing page funnel cut cost per qualified lead by 3.3x.
hoogah.before: Instant-form leads that went quiet after the click
hoogah.after: Landing page funnel, 3.3x cheaper qualified leads

restart.name: Restart Medical
story: A UK clinic with a premium treatment and a familiar problem: ad leads went cold before the team could reply.
TGE runs the Meta campaigns and built the machine behind them: an AI agent that answers every inquiry, plus a custom booking system.
Result: every lead gets answered around the clock and consultations book themselves, day or night.
restart.before: Leads waited hours for a reply and went cold
restart.after: Every inquiry answered 24/7, consultations booked automatically

sidexside.name: SideXSide
story: A campus safety app for women, aiming at US universities. Zero brand awareness in a slow-moving market.
TGE built the entire go-to-market: website, ICP research, cold email and LinkedIn outreach, Meta ads, and a monthly content engine.
Result: a multi-channel pipeline reaching 870 university decision-makers in its first campaign, with content shipping every month.
sidexside.before: A great product no university had heard of
sidexside.after: Multi-channel outreach engine live across email, LinkedIn, and Meta
